title: Institute For Sufi Studies Electronic Payment
content:
Institute For Sufi Studies Electronic Payment

Online Payment

ABOUT THE PAYMENT SYSTEM

The information of the person who will enroll in the Training Program must be entered in the pre-registration form that comes when the relevant button above is pressed.

PHASE II: Creating a user account

After the pre-registration form is completed, your username and password will be activated when you click on the Activation button at the end of the message.

***Participants who have made online payments in previous periods and have a user account can skip this stage and start the registration process directly from the

PAYMENT SYSTEM.

You can make your payment by logging in from the

PAYMENT SYSTEM

page with your username and password.
